name: youtube-studio
description: An open-source AI production cockpit for creating, reviewing, and packaging YouTube videos and Shorts.

scripts.job:smoke: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js smoke
scripts.job:submit: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js submit
scripts.job:approve: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js approve
scripts.job:reject: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js reject
scripts.job:server: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js server
scripts.roadmap:status: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js roadmap-status
scripts.video-pipeline: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js video-pipeline
scripts.video-professional-readiness: pnpm run build && node dist/apps/orchestrator/src/cli.js video-professional-readiness
